page: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEDV6 server family. Powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance utilizes the x86_64 CPU architecture and provides 64 dedicated vCPUs. The hardware configuration delivers 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high-density ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

For storage-intensive operations, the instance is bundled with 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. The server does not include any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The EC64eds_v6 offers qualitative resource efficiency for workloads requiring large in-memory datasets relative to compute resources. The combination of 512.0 GB of RAM and 3780 GB of local storage makes this instance suitable for large relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise applications, and data-intensive workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEDV6 family, built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high-density ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. For storage-heavy operations, the instance is bundled with 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not include graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive and data-heavy enterprise workloads, offering qualitative resource efficiency by balancing massive memory capacity with substantial local storage. It is well-suited for hosting large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, and complex data processing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC64eds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs, 512.0 GB of RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage for demanding database and enterprise workloads.
